allowed_local_actions.description: Generate tracked JSON readback from existing local planning artifacts.
Run local CLI commands that read/write planning artifacts.
Materialize empty skeleton files under an explicit tempdir target.
Materialize empty skeleton files under an explicit ignored local workspace target.
Prepare and record local source identity decision JSON.
Update compact docs/readme pointers to generated artifacts.
Run targeted tests and JSON parse checks.

deferred_local_actions.description: Human/source identity review may open the URL later; this slice does not.
Video/audio fetch and download remain later local integration work.
Transcript generation remains later work after local media exists.
Diagnostic or production render is not part of this slice.
Thumbnail proof or image generation remains later work.
Local media conversion and processing remain outside this slice.

true_external_gates.description: Public upload, visibility, publishing, and monetization.
OAuth, API keys, credentials, and login-backed services.
Legal judgement, rights approval, or public-ready claims.
Force push, reset, history rewrite, or broad destructive cleanup.
Irreversible overwrite of source or operator-authored evidence.
